issues_fixed.title: Room Not Found Error
issues_fixed.problem: VideoCallActivity and AudioCallActivity generated a room_id and sent it via SMS, but never created the room record in the Supabase call_rooms table. When the web client opened the link and queried the database, the room didn't exist.
issues_fixed.fix: Added createRoomRecord() to both activities that inserts the room into the database BEFORE sending the SMS link.

issues_fixed.title: OTP Not Sending
issues_fixed.problem: Activities showed 'Link opened!' but never sent the OTP SMS. The OTP sending logic only existed in CallRoomFragment.
issues_fixed.fix: Added sendOtpSms() to both activities, triggered when the web client opens the link (SiteOpened event). Now sends the 6-digit access code via SMS.

issues_fixed.title: WebRTC Crash (Fatal Error)
issues_fixed.problem: Fatal error: AddStream is not available with Unified Plan SdpSemantics - app crashed when activating a call.
issues_fixed.fix: Replaced deprecated addStream() with addTrack() in WebRtcManager. Also replaced onAddStream observer with onAddTrack.

issues_fixed.title: One-Way Media (Video/Audio Not Sending)
issues_fixed.problem: Android's video/audio was not being sent to the web client. Web saw themselves, Android saw web, but Android's own media wasn't transmitted.
issues_fixed.fix: Tracks are now added to the peer connection immediately when created (in setupLocalAudio() and setupLocalVideo()). createOffer() now waits for tracks to be ready before creating the SDP offer.

issues_fixed.title: Demo Mode Added
issues_fixed.problem: Need to test without spending SMS credits or triggering rate limits.
issues_fixed.fix: Created a modular SMS system with demo mode: SmsConfig.DEMO_MODE = false sends real SMS via Twilio; SmsConfig.DEMO_MODE = true logs SMS to console with no network call.

issues_fixed.title: Local Video Preview Black Screen
issues_fixed.problem: During video calls, the phone's local video preview was black even though camera was active and video was being sent to web. Remote video worked fine.
issues_fixed.fix: Reordered initialization in activateWebRtc() to initialize localView AFTER webRtcManager.startLocalStream() so the SurfaceViewRenderer attaches to an already-created video track.

complete_call_flow: Inmate initiates call -> Room created in Supabase with status WAITING + OTP generated
SMS link sent to contact's phone
Contact opens link -> Web client finds room -> broadcasts site-opened
Android receives event -> updates status to OTP_SENT -> sends OTP SMS
Contact enters OTP -> verifies -> status becomes ACTIVE
WebRTC connects -> tracks added to PC -> offer created with media -> call established
